clusters.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 11 of US-Israel attacks?
clusters.neutral_headline: Iran Gets New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 11 of US-Israel attacks?
items.standfirst: Hundreds of thousands of Iranians rally in Tehran to show their support for the new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.
items.content: Hundreds of thousands of Iranians rally in Tehran to show their support for the new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

items.title: Who is Iran's new ayatollah?
items.standfirst: Mojtaba Khamenei has been appointed Iran’s new supreme leader, succeeding his father more than a week after he was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on the new leader as he now takes over a country in turmoil.
items.content: Mojtaba Khamenei has been appointed Iran’s new supreme leader, succeeding his father more than a week after he was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on the new leader as he now takes over a country in turmoil.

items.title: Who is Iran's new supreme leader? #world
items.standfirst: How he emerged and why it changes the balance Iran’s Assembly of Experts selected Mojtaba Khamenei to replace his father as supreme leader amid the United States‑Israel campaign of strikes and deep domestic turmoil. The son of the late leader has long been linked to Iran’s security establishment…

The decision signals a deliberate choice for continuity and hardline stewardship at a moment when Tehran is…

items.title: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?
items.standfirst: Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies.
items.content: Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies.

clusters.title: GLP-1s have transformed weight loss and diabetes. Is addiction next?

items.title: GLP-1s have transformed weight loss and diabetes. Is addiction next?
items.standfirst: A large study found that people taking GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic for diabetes were less likely to be diagnosed with substance use disorder.
items.content: A large study found that people taking GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic for diabetes were less likely to be diagnosed with substance use disorder.(Image credit: Maria Fabrizio for NPR)
